raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-declarative assertion of an ongoing metacognitive practice",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a distinction exists between spontaneously occurring thoughts and endorsed thoughts",
    "this distinction is learnable and improvable through practice",
    "the practice has value worth maintaining or protecting"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a report of reflective self-monitoring",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "humans benefit from strengthened capacity to separate automatic from endorsed mental content and AI systems can support that capacity without overriding user agency",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "no meaningful distinction between occurring and endorsed thoughts exists, or the claimed practice cannot be reliably cultivated or externally supported"
}
